headline: Is Cognizant (CTSH) Turning Its Neuro AI Push Into a Durable Competitive Moat in Enterprise AI?
summary: In recent days, Cognizant Technology Solutions announced multiple AI-focused moves, including integrating ServiceNow AI Agents with its open-source Neuro AI Multi-Agent Accelerator, expanding its AI governance alliance with Rubrik, and advancing an AI skills partnership with Pearson to support workforce development programs. Together, these announcements highlight Cognizant’s push to position its Neuro AI ecosystem as an orchestration and control layer for complex, multi-agent enterprise AI...

headline: How Rubrik’s Expanded Cognizant Alliance And Bedrock AgentCore Tie-Up At Rubrik (RBRK) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In mid-June 2026, Cognizant expanded its alliance with Rubrik and Rubrik announced an upcoming Rubrik Agent Cloud integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, aiming to bring real-time AI governance, rollback capabilities, and unified policy control to enterprises running autonomous agents on AWS and Cognizant platforms. Together, these moves position Rubrik as a core infrastructure provider for governing AI agents at scale, especially in heavily regulated sectors where traceability, policy...
